prompt:
Theme: Sea Breeze Slope

Person/Expression:
A woman in her 20s. Natural and mature atmosphere, healthy expression without looking childish. Dark brown medium-length hair gently curled, with ends flowing slightly in the sea breeze. Transparent Japanese-style makeup, thin base, natural complexion, and realistic skin texture. Looking back over her shoulder at the camera with a bright, open smile.

Clothing/Pose:
Maintain the person, expression, background, and composition of the generated photo, and only adjust the clothing to match the atmosphere of the reference image. Light ivory sleeveless dress, thin shoulder straps, clean open-back design, elegantly covered chest, and naturally cinched at the waist. The skirt is short with soft pleated material, swirling in the wind. The right hand lightly pinches the edge of the skirt, and the left arm flows naturally behind. The body semi-rotates while moving down the slope, weight on one leg. Elegant exposure, avoiding transparency or excessive sexual expression.

Background/Light:
A slope with a view of the sea. Blue ocean in the background, white houses on left and right, palm trees, low walls, and blurred cityscapes in the distance. Clear summer day, sky is a pale, piercing blue. Main light is strong sunlight from the top right, brightly lighting the hair silhouette and shoulders. Soft reflected light from buildings and the road on the left. Shadows fall from the feet toward the bottom left, with faint shadows of palm leaves on the road.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition. Full-body portrait from above the knees. Subject is slightly right of center, occupying 65% of the frame. The road lines and houses create depth leading to the sea. Camera at chest height, eye-level. Background has shallow blur, focus on the face and skirt hem. Natural telephoto compression.

Texture/Style:
High-quality Japanese photography style. Summer sunlight, fine wrinkles in white fabric, thin cotton shadows, fine hair strands, and natural skin pores meticulously depicted. Bright high-key tones but not overexposed. Avoid excessive HDR or artificial AI look; aim for natural photographic expression.

Negative:
Childlike appearance, infantilization, excessive exposure, transparent clothes, unnatural face or gaze, duplicate faces, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, fabric moving against gravity, unnatural shadows, excessive skin smoothing, plastic skin, text, logos, watermarks, background signs, excessive HDR.
